title: Bridge Essay: Mindfulness, cognition, and long-term meditators: Toward a science of advanced m

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Mindfulness, cognition, and long-term meditators: Toward ascience of advanced meditation.**. Imaging Neurosci (Camb).. PMID: 40800948. DOI: 10.1162/IMAG.a.82. Mindfulness meditation is asystematic training in equanimity, sensory clarity, and concentration rooted in ancient contemplative traditions. Here, we synthesized cognitive-behavioral outcomes in long-term meditators (LTMs) resulting from diverse, prolonged meditation practices. Preliminary evidence suggests that LTMs exhibit increased cognitive-sensory integration and decoupling of affective processes, demonstrated by enhanced interoceptive awareness, reduced negative affective pain perception,
